brand.name: Gallery Regalo
brand.footerNote: A Georgian gift gallery. Batumi · Tbilisi · Country-wide delivery.

home.heroSubtitle: Porcelain, tableware, holiday pieces and curated objects — for every occasion that matters.
home.storyTitle: From four outlets to your door
home.storyBody: Three galleries in Batumi, one new gallery in Tbilisi, and country-wide delivery — Gallery Regalo brings considered, gift-ready objects to anyone in Georgia.

shop.title: The Gallery
shop.subtitle: Every piece, on a clean white field.
shop.empty: No items match your filters yet.

product.shippingBody: Country-wide delivery in Georgia. 1–3 business days.
product.careBody: Hand-wash recommended for porcelain. Avoid dishwasher and microwave.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.paymentNote: You will be redirected to your bank's secure page. We never see or store your card.
checkout.successBody: Your order is in. A confirmation email is on its way.

auth.signInSubtitle: Enter your email — we'll send you a one-tap sign-in link.
auth.sentBody: We sent a magic link to {email}. Tap it to sign in.

account.title: Your account
account.noOrders: You haven't placed any orders yet.

about.title: About Gallery Regalo
about.lead: We are a gift gallery, not a warehouse.
about.body: Started in Batumi, Gallery Regalo curates porcelain, tableware, holiday pieces, board games and silverware for the moments worth marking. Three galleries in Batumi, one new gallery in Tbilisi, and delivery anywhere in Georgia.

contact.title: Contact
contact.lead: Questions, custom orders, wholesale — write to us.
